title: Create Vampirism
description: A Create Addon that tries to automate Vampirism a little
body:
# Create: Vampirism Vampirism is a fantastic mod, but some of its mechanics can feel like a grind. Create: Vampirism adds new ways for vampires and hunters to progress more efficiently — without losing the charm of the original. Available for both **Forge 1.20.1** and **NeoForge 1.21.1**! --- ## What does this mod add? ### Organ Drops & Blood Production Certain mobs now drop **organs** that can be processed step by step — with **blood** at the end of the production chain. If setting up a passive mob farm isn't your thing, you can alternatively craft the **Blood Generator**: a block that produces blood passively over time. ### Bottle Filling Station The **Bottle Filling Station** automatically fills bottles with blood. Connect it to a Create fluid pipe filled with blood, feed it bottles — done. ### Holy Water for Hunters Hunters aren't left out either. The **Holy Pearl** and **Holy Blessing** allow you to produce Holy Water in an automated way, skipping the tedious manual crafting process. ### Blasters & Ammunition Both factions get their own **blaster item** with matching ammunition — a new tool in the ongoing war between vampires and hunters. --- ## Crafting Most items — including the Blood Generator, Holy Pearl, Holy Blessing, and the blasters — are crafted using **Create's crafting mechanics**. The Bottle Filling Station is the exception and uses a standard crafting recipe. --- ## A note on textures The mod is still in active development, and that shows in some places. Most textures are a work-in-progress — the **organ items** being a notable exception, which already look great. --- ## ⚠️ Transparency Notice This mod is a passion project maintained in my free time. Updates may be infrequent. Thank you for your understanding! --- ## Requirements This mod requires **both** of the following mods to be installed (they will automaticly installed when you install this mod): - [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - [**Vampirism**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) --- ## Compatibility | Minecraft | Mod Loader | Status | |-----------|------------|--------| | 1.20.1 | Forge | ✅ Supported | | 1.21.1 | NeoForge | ✅ Supported | --- ## 💬 Feedback & Ideas Ideas for new features, balance tweaks, or texture feedback are always welcome. Every bit of feedback helps! [**Feedback**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpPpGfksI5CDNnkGeKZqkC1tmB-dugK6c_ZKWU1Oj6hBQJZw/viewform?usp=dialog)
[**Bug-Report**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScdgOgpcKSNjVxYeUeIEj6-74P0Lt0vvZA3VSGHs7f3L3Xekw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=102875142342963585090)
